message:
feat(label): extend label support to create, spawn, and quick commands

Completes the multi-session label feature (bd-1933u) by propagating
--label flag support across all session creation entry points.

Commands updated:
- ntm create: Added --label/-l flag with session name formatting
- ntm spawn: Added --label/-l flag (CLI direct invocation)
- ntm quick: Added --label/-l flag for rapid session+agent creation

Implementation:
- config.ValidateLabel(): Validates label format (alphanumeric, dash, underscore)
- config.FormatSessionName(): Constructs "base--label" session names
- Label validation errors return clear error messages

Test coverage:
- label_test.go: Unit tests for ValidateLabel() and FormatSessionName()
  - Valid labels: alphanumeric, with dashes/underscores
  - Invalid labels: special chars, spaces, empty, too long
  - Session name formatting edge cases

Robot mode:
- Updated capabilities documentation with spawn-label parameter
- Added label field to SpawnOptions struct usage

This ensures consistent session naming across all NTM entry points,
enabling reliable multi-session workflows in flywheel swarms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
